## Checklist
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` compiles
- [ ] Non-coder flow still works (deploy → `/admin` → claim → seed)
- [ ] Touched `convex/`? schema changes are additive
- [ ] Updated `docs/` / `CHANGELOG.md` if behaviour changed
